vol_name: Does Timing Matter? Efficacy of a Cognitive and Motor Intervention for Very Preterm Infants (SPEEDI-2)
vol_description:
This data represented the outcome measures from a 3 arm clinical trial.  Infants born at less than 32 weeks of gestation were enrolled from 3 NICU when medically stable.  Infants were randomized into usual care (UC), SPEEDI_Early (starting in NICU), or SPEEDI_Late (Starting about 4 months old).  

Measures including Bayley III, GMFM, HINE, APSP, a parent child interaction, Parent stress index, medical and social history, AMHEAD.
